SUCCESS: I have successfully authenticated with the Hugging Face Hub using the JARVIS_HF_TOKEN. The confirmed working method is: from huggingface_hub import login; login(token=os.getenv('JARVIS_HF_TOKEN')). I should use this method whenever Hugging Face access is required.

CRITICAL CORRECTION: NVIDIA NIM models are CLOUD-BASED APIs. Do NOT attempt to download them using the transformers library (e.g., from_pretrained). This will fail and cause system hangs. Instead, use the OpenAI-compatible API at https://integrate.api.nvidia.com/v1 with your JARVIS_HF_TOKEN or NVIDIA_API_KEY. Use the python 'openai' library to call these models remotely.
